$comment: Example settings for Anthropic's sandbox-runtime (srt) wrapping ritual's headless agent runs. Install: npm i -g @anthropic-ai/sandbox-runtime; Arch deps: pacman -S bubblewrap socat ripgrep. Point [sandbox] wrapper at it: wrapper = "srt --settings /home/you/.config/ritual/srt-settings.json --" (check `srt --help` for whether your version wants `--` before the command). Tune allowWrite to YOUR project layout; /var/tmp/ritual-target is this repo's cargo target dir.
